record_types.name: BOD_Register
CHIP_RESET_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_7
fields.description:
Read-only. Last reset was from the power-on reset or brown-out
detection blocks

fields.name: Reserved_9_15
fields.description: Read-only. Last reset was from the RUN pin

fields.name: Reserved_17_19
fields.description: Read-only. Last reset was from the debug port

fields.name: Reserved_21_23
fields.description:
Write data bit of one shall clear (set to zero) the corresponding bit
in the field. This is set by psm_restart from the debugger.\n Its
purpose is to branch bootcode to a safe mode when the debugger has
issued a psm_restart in order to recover from a boot lock-up.\n In
the safe mode the debugger can repair the boot code, clear this flag
then reboot the processor.

record_types.name: VREG_AND_CHIP_RESET_Peripheral
VREG_Register

fields.name: EN
fields.description:
high impedance mode select\n 0=not in high impedance mode, 1=in high
impedance mode

fields.name: Reserved_8_11
fields.description: Read-only. regulation status\n 0=not in regulation, 1=in regulation

variables.name: VREG_AND_CHIP_RESET_Periph
variables.code:
VREG_AND_CHIP_RESET_Periph : aliased VREG_AND_CHIP_RESET_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => VREG_AND_CHIP_RESET_Base;
